name: Shinhan S&P500 VIX S/T Futures
summary: Shinhan S&P500 VIX S/T Futures is an Exchange Traded Note (ETN) or fund offered by Shinhan Investment Corporation that provides exposure to short-term futures contracts on the VIX (Volatility Index) related to the S&P 500. It allows investors to gain exposure to market volatility as measured by the VIX.
